name: Cocoa - Spice Snackin' Cake
recipeInstructions: Combine the melted butter and cocoa; mix in applesauce. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt. Mix in the cocoa mixture and egg until the dry ingredients are moistened. Stir in the nuts. Pour into a greased 9-inch square pan. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes or until a cake tester comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan.
